race.comment: Tricky contest and no shock to see a boil over. LORD OF BISCAY (1) classy import who bounced off his good first-up third, with a dominant victory over 1400m at Newcastle in the Provincial Mid Wildcard. Finished an unlucky second here last year and sure to be thereabouts. MATCHA LATTE (5) won this race last year and kept fresh after blitzing them over 1400m at Hawkesbury in the Provincial Mid Champs. Since fitted with a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m. Can get cover from the wide gate and not without genuine top-four claims. OUI OUI OUI (8) one of the finds of the Summer who was strong late with a close-up eighth in the G3 B/Day Card over 1200m at Rosehill Gardens. Gets a better set-up and not to be overlooked. BUFFALO (6) progressive gelding who returned with a fast finishing win over 1400m at Newcastle in the Provincial Mid Champs. Group1 placed at two and look for him rattling late from the wide gate. IL PASSERO (3) talented gelding likely to go back from poor gate. Place best.
